creator: itetcu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Unfortunatelly it doesn't fix the problem, see QATty log with the patch 
applied 
http://qatty.tecnik93.com//errors/7-STABLE-FPT-CustDir/liblastfm-0.3.0.log. 
LOCALBASE is where we find already installed software (so usually 
--with-include-dir=${LOCALBSE}/include is corect), PREFIX is where this 
port installs its files.
